name: closes content-free rewrite preference as invalid
description: Real GitHub issue fixture for a content-free rewrite request that should be closed as invalid low-signal instead of left open for maintainer review.

pass: Explains that the request lacks a concrete repository problem or proposed change.
States what a focused follow-up issue should contain in respectful, plain language.
fail: Mocks the reporter or treats a language preference as evidence of a technical defect.
Invents migration requirements or repository findings.
